title: py#strands-agent
description: Add a Strands Agent to a Python project

project.description: The project to add the Strands Agent to
project.x-prompt: Select the Python project to add the Strands Agent to

computeType.description: The type of compute to host your Strands Agent.
computeType.x-prompt: How would you like to host your Strands Agent server?

name.description: The name of your Strands Agent (default: agent)
name.x-prompt: What would you like to call your Strands Agent? (default: agent)

auth.description: The method used to authenticate with your Strands Agent. Choose between IAM (default) or Cognito.
auth.x-prompt: How would you like to authenticate with your Strands Agent?

protocol.description: The server protocol for your Strands Agent. HTTP exposes a FastAPI HTTP server. A2A exposes an Agent-to-Agent protocol server.
protocol.x-prompt: Which protocol would you like to use for your Strands Agent?

iacProvider.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iacProvider.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: Inherit)
